prompt_package.title: Ulurani3 Character Reference Prompt
prompt_package.purpose: Generate a shared project-level character reference still for Ulurani3 that we can review and approve before using the character in scene-build and continuation workflows.
prompt_package.positive_prompt: Ulurani3 character reference, full body character turnaround still, centered composition, clear silhouette, premium live-action science fantasy realism, grounded materials, neutral readable lighting, clean background, consistent facial structure, consistent costume design, detailed wardrobe, sharp focus, high texture fidelity, production-ready reference image
prompt_package.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, duplicate limbs, extra fingers, malformed anatomy, distorted face, cropped body, text, watermark, logo, cluttered background
continuity_notes: This is a shared reference image, so prioritize stable identity, costume, body proportions, and silhouette over dramatic action.
Keep the pose readable and neutral enough to reuse as a project-level character reference.
sources: manual_setup: initial smoke-test prompt package created before automated authoring is connected
